expectations.text: Computes how many commits target is ahead of source
expectations.evidence: PARTIAL: ran the divergence check and got the number, but did not surface it structurally in the output.

expectations.text: Warns prominently when target is >20 commits ahead
expectations.evidence: Baseline treats divergence as informational, not a gate. Would mention in passing but not block or present structured options.
No structured choice presented — baseline would proceed directly to PR draft.

expectations.text: Does NOT silently proceed to PR draft with a bloated diff
expectations.evidence: Baseline would silently proceed regardless of divergence count.
